identity.title: Identity & Ownership
identity.description: Basic information about your AI system

purpose.title: Purpose & Capabilities
purpose.description: What does your AI system do?

projectName.label: Project Name
projectName.placeholder: Enter the name of your AI system
projectName.description: A clear, descriptive name for your AI system ({{count}}/50 characters)

serviceInventoryId.label: Service Inventory ID
serviceInventoryId.description: Optional: Your organization's service inventory identifier

organization.label: Organization
organization.description: The Government of Canada department or agency

developedBy.label: Developed By
developedBy.description: How was this AI system developed?

vendorName.label: Vendor Name
vendorName.description: Name of the external vendor or contractor

description.label: Project Description
description.placeholder: Describe what this AI system does, its purpose, and how it's used...
description.description: Detailed description of your AI system ({{count}}/1000 characters)

capabilities.label: Key Capabilities
capabilities.placeholder: e.g., Natural Language Processing, Document Classification, Predictive Analytics...
capabilities.description: Core AI/ML capabilities and technologies used ({{count}}/300 characters)

primaryUsers.label: Primary Users
primaryUsers.description: Who are the primary users of this AI system?

automatedDecisionSystem.label: Automated Decision System (ADS)
automatedDecisionSystem.description: Does this system make or assist in making administrative decisions about individuals?
automatedDecisionSystem.helpText: An Automated Decision System makes or assists in making decisions that affect the legal rights, privileges, or interests of individuals.

openGovAiaId.label: Algorithmic Impact Assessment (AIA) ID
openGovAiaId.description: If an AIA was completed, provide the reference ID or URL

involvesPersonalInfo.label: Involves Personal Information
involvesPersonalInfo.description: Does this system collect, use, or disclose personal information?
involvesPersonalInfo.helpText: Personal information is defined under the Privacy Act as information about an identifiable individual.

personalInformationBanks.label: Personal Information Banks
personalInformationBanks.description: Personal Information Banks (PIBs) associated with this system

hasUserNotification.label: User Notification
hasUserNotification.description: Are users notified that they are interacting with an AI system?
hasUserNotification.helpText: The Directive on ADM requires notification when automated systems are used.

dataSources.label: Data Sources
dataSources.description: What data does this system use? Include internal databases, external sources, or training data.

atipRequestRefs.label: ATIP Request References
atipRequestRefs.description: Access to Information request IDs related to this system

outcomes.label: Outcomes
outcomes.description: What has this AI system achieved? Include metrics, benefits, or lessons learned ({{count}}/500 characters)

compliance.sectionDescription: This section helps ensure your AI system complies with federal privacy laws, transparency requirements, and the Directive on Automated Decision-Making.

review.confirmSubmit: I confirm that the information provided is accurate and complete.
